get.description: Account overview: details + contacts + recent visit history + activity counts.

post.description:
Move an account through the funnel; records who/when in status history.

Allowed for the assigned rep (or any manager). Validates the transition.

schema.title: Response Status History Accounts  Account Id  Status History Get
Response List Contacts Accounts  Account Id  Contacts Get

delete.description: Soft-delete: flip is_active off so historical samples/orders keep the product.

post.description: Check in / log a visit. Attributed to the signed-in rep.

schema.title: Response List Visits Accounts  Account Id  Visits Get

post.description: Get a presigned PUT URL; the client uploads the photo straight to storage.
Record an uploaded object against the visit (call after the PUT succeeds).

schema.title: Response List Media Visits  Visit Id  Media Get
Response List Samples Accounts  Account Id  Samples Get
Response List Orders Accounts  Account Id  Orders Get
Response Funnel Accounts Funnel Accounts Get

get.description: Accounts within `radius_m` metres of a point (rep 'near me'). Rep-scoped.

schema.title: Response Nearby Accounts Geo Accounts Nearby Get

get.description:
Grid rollup of geocoded accounts into area cells (manager territory view).

`precision` is decimal places to snap to: 1 ~= 11 km cells, 2 ~= 1.1 km.

schema.title: Response Account Clusters Geo Accounts Clusters Get

get.description: Liveness probe — confirms the API process is up.
Readiness probe — confirms Postgres + PostGIS are reachable.

schema.title: Response Health Db Health Db Get

ClusterCell.title: ClusterCell
ClusterCell.description: An aggregated area of accounts (grid rollup) for the territory map.
